mode_description: Stata-match: float32 storage, verified 100% cell-by-cell vs tim Stata
weight_variable: weind (RT-level, konstan per RT; sum nasional = populasi tertimbang)
methodology: gen bensin = b42k4/r301 if kode==nilai; gen bensin_l = b42k3/r301 if kode==liter; collapse sum per urut; merge wb_full.dta; bensin_h = bensin/bensin_l; classify tier; tabulate weighted by weind
caveats: Cutoff berbeda antar era. Growth 2022 ke 2023 cross-era bisa artifact cutoff change.
Tier Pertamax era 2 mix Pertamax Pertamina dan RON 92 non-Pertamina (Shell Super, BP, Vivo). Median tier Rp 12,000 karena mass non-Pertamina.
Tier Pertamax Turbo bisa berisi RON 98, RON 95 (Shell V-Power), dan RON 92 non-Pertamina harga mahal. Label tidak 100% refleksi grade.
2025 Pertalite anomali: median Rp 8,722 (bukan Rp 10,000). Perlu investigasi.
Surge Pertamax Turbo 2022 sebagian besar karena reclassification Shell price hike Feb 2022, bukan orang ganti BBM.
Pertamax Plus sudah dihentikan Desember 2016. Pertamax Green baru Juli 2023.

columns.jenis_bbm: Kategori BBM berdasarkan harga per liter
columns.pct_dalam_kelas: Persentase jenis BBM dalam (prov, kelas), sum per (prov, kelas) = 100
